text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The air is fresh and the stars are out. It should be
a nice run this evening.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Hm? Someone else is running at this hour?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just a little more...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I was hoping I'd be able to train alone...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh well. There's no point worrying about it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(It's not a partner run. We just happen to be
running individually, side by side...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(We're physically close to each other, but in a
way, we're incredibly far apart.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah... This isn't bad. I feel like I could keep on
running, no matter how long.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(She's so dazzling... all alone. No matter how
much I try to keep up, I can't close the distance at
all.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Her footwork is just like...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ah... No, it's nothing. Are you going to keep
running?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, just for a bit. Um, is it okay if I go?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to do a little more too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Almost as if engaged in a long and silent
discussion, the two continue to run through the
evening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the encounter, Admire Vega becomes
an even more formidable runner.
